content:
Once I was able to read all on my lonesome I found my tastes getting a bit more risqué than The Lion, The Witch, and The Wardrobe and mom was able to go back to reading her gross mom erotica again. Yuck.

The fact that my mom read me stories to go to sleep, the fact that my family and I would go to the movies weekly, the fact my school went to plays and musicals yearly all speak to one thing: people love stories.

Narrative is the lens through which we can experience universal cathartic experiences and cleanse ourselves of live’s burdens. Since the Dr. Suess days I have dedicated my life to writing and understanding the power of the written word.

I think therefore I am. So then if “words are thoughts that stay” (according to The Neverending Story) and our wits are all we got you best have the sharpest wit and the sharpest words.

So let’s bottom line this. Here’s what I believe: anyone can be president or ceo of wherever or whatever. We’re either in a process of blooming or decaying. And I’m both!
context: From document: Lets cut to the chase. You having to read this is as  much a waste… — chunk 3 (chunk 3/3)
